overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a walk across an elevated city bridge during dusk. The player passes palm trees and pedestrians, travels under a large decorative metal arch, and approaches a street intersection with modern urban buildings in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated bridge walkway with palm tree landscaping

events.description: pedestrians appear walking in the opposite direction
white sedan passes by on the left side of the bridge

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the bridge walkway with palm trees on the left

white sedan driving on the road to the left

green metal railing along the edge of the walkway
cluster of downtown skyscrapers visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along an elevated bridge walkway during dusk. Tall palm trees line the left side while the city skyline stretches ahead. Several pedestrians walk toward the camera and pass by, and a white sedan drives past on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: bridge walkway approaching the metal arch structure

agents.ego_description: continuing along the bridge walkway as the palm trees thin out

entered.detail: large dark metal truss arch spanning across the road ahead
grass-covered slope replacing the palm tree line

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking along the bridge as the palm trees give way to grassy embankments. A large metal arch structure becomes visible in the distance ahead, and the white apartment building appears closer on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: bridge walkway passing under the metal arch

events.description: passing underneath the large metal arch structure

agents.ego_description: walking under the metal arch and approaching the street intersection

entered.detail: low-rise pink building with striped awnings and storefronts
multi-level open-air parking structure with concrete columns

segments.scene_description: The walkway leads under the imposing metal arch structure. On the left, a pink commercial building with awnings comes into view, while a multi-level parking garage appears on the right. The bridge railing and grassy areas fall behind as the camera approaches the end of the bridge.

events.description: exiting the bridge and entering the street intersection area

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the crosswalk at the intersection

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving through the intersection ahead

entered.detail: zebra crossing with red and white painted stripes
red octagonal stop sign at the street corner
tall turquoise apartment building with multiple windows

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the bridge and arrives at a street intersection with a prominent crosswalk. The metal arch falls behind as the parking garage looms larger on the right. A stop sign and blue apartment building mark the corner, while vehicles navigate the intersection ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk across an elevated bridge at dusk that transitions from a palm-lined promenade into a dense urban intersection. It begins by moving past tall palm trees and pedestrians with a city skyline stretching ahead, while a white sedan drives by on the left. As the camera advances, the palm trees give way to grassy embankments and a large metal arch structure emerges in the distance. The scene then shifts as the camera passes under the imposing arch, leaving the bridge railings behind to reveal a pink commercial building and a multi-level parking garage. Finally, the movement concludes as the camera exits the bridge and arrives at a street intersection marked by a crosswalk, a stop sign, and a blue apartment building.
